# FutureMarketingAI (FMai)

> FMai is a Dutch AI marketing partnership for agencies. Clyde, the AI Marketing Medewerker, runs 12 skills (9 live, 3 coming soon) across up to 50 brand workspaces with per-brand memory isolation. Five tiers from Partner (347 EUR/mo) to Enterprise (7,997 EUR/mo), plus a Founding Member program at 997 EUR/mo lifetime (10 spots, 1 taken). Max 20 new partnerships per year. EU-native, AVG and EU AI Act ready. Application-gated: no self-service signup.

FMai is a high-touch AI marketing partnership founded by Daley. It targets performance and growth agencies in the Netherlands and EU managing 10 to 50 brand portfolios. Instead of selling isolated AI tools, FMai provides one persistent AI Marketing Employee named Clyde who learns each brand over time, remembers per-brand voice, operates across 12 skills from social media to voice agents, and is orchestrated by the founder personally. The proof case is SkinClarity Club, where Sindy (founder) runs 4 brands and 3 Instagram accounts autonomously with 6 active skills.

The product is not a self-serve SaaS. Every engagement starts with an application at https://future-marketing.ai/nl/apply. Daley reviews personally within 48 hours. The max 20 partnerships per year constraint is honored through this gate.

Contact: hello@future-marketing.ai. Canonical domain: https://future-marketing.ai. Languages: Dutch (source of truth), English, Spanish.

## Core pages

- [Home (NL)](https://future-marketing.ai/nl): Hero "Dit is Clyde" plus 12-skill overview, SKC case, founding counter, FAQ.
- [Memory system](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/memory): Why Clyde's 4-layer memory (Vandaag / Deze maand / Archief / Wie het merk is) is the USP. Per-brand isolation via Supabase RLS. Nightly dream consolidation.
- [Pricing](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/pricing): 5 tiers from Partner 347 EUR to Enterprise 7,997 EUR. Founding Member 997 EUR lifetime (10 spots). Skill packs and credit packs for Partner tier add-ons. No annual discount yet.
- [Founding Member](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/founding-member): 10-spot program, lifetime 997 EUR (circa 60 percent below Growth), grandfathered price, direct founder access. 1 spot taken (SkinClarity Club).
- [Apply](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/apply): Application form for partnership. 8 fields. Response within 48 hours.
- [How it works](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/how-it-works): Week-by-week onboarding cadence, first month correction loop, quarterly strategy, annual retrospective.
- [About](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/about): Solo founder Daley. 20 partnerships per year cap. Why partnership over SaaS.
- [Case: SkinClarity Club](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/case-studies/skinclarity-club): Sindy, 4 brands, 3 IG accounts, 6 active skills. The proof case.
- [Contact](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/contact): Simple form. For partnership inquiries use Apply instead.

## 12 Skills

- [Social Media Manager](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/skills/social-media): Captions, scheduling, carousels and engagement in brand voice. Live.
- [Blog Factory](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/skills/blog-factory): Longform SEO articles 1500 to 3000 words, keyword to publish. Live.
- [Ad Creator](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/skills/ad-creator): Static and video ad creatives for Meta Ads and TikTok. Live.
- [Reel Builder](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/skills/reel-builder): Short video generation from product imagery. Coming soon.
- [Voice Agent](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/skills/voice-agent): Inbound and outbound calls via ElevenLabs. Live with demo.
- [Lead Qualifier](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/skills/lead-qualifier): Multi-channel lead scoring and routing. Live.
- [Email Management](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/skills/email-management): Inbox triage, drafting, categorization. Coming soon.
- [ManyChat DM](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/skills/manychat): Instagram and Messenger automations. Coming soon.
- [Reporting and Analytics](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/skills/reporting): Weekly digests, anomaly alerts, cross-platform KPIs. Live.
- [SEO / GEO Analyst](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/skills/seo-geo): Technical SEO plus AI citation monitoring. Live.
- [Research](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/skills/research): Market research, trends, competitor analysis with sources. Live.
- [Clyde](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/skills/clyde): The orchestrator who routes natural-language instructions to the right skill. Live.

## English and Spanish

- [Home (EN)](https://future-marketing.ai/en): English mirror of NL source.
- [Home (ES)](https://future-marketing.ai/es): Spanish mirror of NL source.
- [Pricing (EN)](https://future-marketing.ai/en/pricing): English pricing.
- [Pricing (ES)](https://future-marketing.ai/es/pricing): Spanish pricing.

## Optional

- [Blog](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/blog): Long-form thinking. Currently 1 post, target 10 in Q1.
- [Legal: Privacy](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/legal/privacy): AVG (GDPR) privacy policy.
- [Legal: Terms](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/legal/terms): Terms of service including subscription terms.
- [Legal: Cookies](https://future-marketing.ai/nl/legal/cookies): Cookie disclosures.
- [Full long-form content for LLMs](https://future-marketing.ai/llms-full.txt): Complete product description with all tiers, skill definitions, case study, memory architecture, AVG stance.
